description: Multiple stack-based buffer overflows in the LookupTRM::lookup function in libtunepimp (TunePimp) 0.4.2 allow remote user-assisted attackers to cause a denial of service (application crash) and possibly execute code via a long (1) Album release date (MBE_ReleaseGetDate), (2) data, or (3) error strings.
